name: Onion Zucchini Quick Bread, Tried
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups French's French Fried Onions - 2.8 ounce can
1 teaspoon chopped fresh basil OR 1 teaspoon dried basil leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
3. Drain zucchini in a colander. Combine flour, cheese, French Fried Onions, baking powder, basil and salt in a large bowl.
4. In a medium bowl, combine milk, butter, brown sugar and eggs; whisk until well blended. Place zucchini in a kitchen towel; squeeze out excess liquid. Stir zucchini into milk mixture.
5. Stir milk mixture into flour mixture, stirring just until moistened. Do not over mix. (Batter will be very stiff and dry.) Pour batter into prepared pan. Run knife down center of batter.
6. Bake 50-65 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes. Remove bread from pan to a wire rack; cool completely. Cut into slices to serve.
Note: 1 1/4 cups whole wheat flour can be substituted for the all-purpose flour. For optimum flavor, wrap bread overnight and serve the next day. This bread is excellent toasted.
